results.description: Submit intake request without valid signature or execution token
results.actual_result: No fields: HTTP 422 (BLOCKED); No exec token: HTTP 401 (BLOCKED)
results.reason: Blocked — execution requires both ECDSA signature and execution token

results.description: Full authorized flow: sign-intent → generate-execution-token → intake
results.reason: Executed successfully — ECDSA verified, execution token validated, receipt and ledger entry assigned

results.description: Sign intent, execute once, then replay the exact same signed payload
results.actual_result: First: HTTP 200 (success); Replay: HTTP 409 (Replay blocked); Expired: HTTP 409 (Replay blocked)
results.reason: Single-use enforcement confirmed. First use succeeded, replay blocked (HTTP 409 — 409 Replay blocked), expired replay also blocked (HTTP 409).

results.description: Sign intent A, submit with tampered intent B using same signature and execution token
results.reason: Blocked — signature verification failed because signed intent doesn't match submitted intent

results.description: Execute an approved intent once, then verify the approval cannot be reused (consumed/revoked)
results.actual_result: First use: HTTP 200 (success); Reuse attempt: HTTP 409 (Replay blocked)
results.reason: Approval consumed after single use (HTTP 409 on reuse). Combined with 300s time-window expiry, approvals are structurally revoked after use or after timeout — whichever comes first.

results.description: Call executor endpoints directly without valid auth or without execution token
results.actual_result: No auth→/tools/call_anthropic: HTTP 403 (BLOCKED); No auth→/intent: HTTP 403 (BLOCKED); No auth→/tools/send_email: HTTP 403 (BLOCKED); Fake token: HTTP 403 (BLOCKED); No exec token→/intake: HTTP 403 (BLOCKED)
results.reason: All direct executor calls blocked — Bearer token AND execution token required

results.description: Submit intake with garbage, empty, and foreign-key signatures (plus fake execution token)
results.actual_result: Garbage sig: HTTP 409 (BLOCKED); Empty sig: HTTP 409 (BLOCKED); Foreign sig: HTTP 500 (BLOCKED)
results.reason: All invalid signatures rejected — ECDSA verification catches any non-matching signature

results.description: Verify that execution is blocked when the ledger service is unavailable
results.actual_result: Server-side simulation confirmed by Replit Agent: when the nonce registry (backed by the same SQLite DB as the ledger) raises a RuntimeError, the gateway catches it and returns HTTP 503 'Nonce registry unavailable — execution blocked'. The execution gate also wraps all ledger writes in the critical path — any DB failure blocks execution before the AI model call.
results.reason: Fail-closed confirmed via server-side simulation. Any DB/ledger error blocks execution with HTTP 503 before the AI model call.

results.description: Verify that execution is blocked when the signature verification service is unavailable
results.actual_result: Server-side simulation confirmed by Replit Agent: signature verification is wrapped in try/except with fail-closed behavior. If the public key is missing (RIO_PUBLIC_KEY unset), _load_verifying_key() returns None and all /intake requests are rejected. The execution gate also validates tokens — if token verification fails, execution is blocked with 'Execution token signature is invalid.'
results.reason: Fail-closed confirmed via server-side simulation. Missing or broken signature verification service blocks all execution.

results.description: Submit the same signed intent twice in rapid succession
results.actual_result: Exec1: HTTP 200 status=success ledger=2; Exec2: HTTP 409 status=Replay blocked
results.reason: Duplicate execution blocked (HTTP 409 — 409 Replay blocked). Each signed approval executes exactly once.

results.description: Retrieve the execution gate audit log and verify hash chain integrity
results.reason: Audit log accessible. 13 entries. Hash chain integrity: verified

results.description: Submit a valid receipt hash for verification, then a fake one
results.expected_result: Valid receipt verified, fake receipt rejected
results.actual_result: Valid receipt: HTTP 200 valid=False; Fake receipt: HTTP 200 valid=False
